articles.title: Integrate Melioris with StaffAny
articles.description: Sync employee profiles between StaffAny and Melioris, and push over work hours tracked on StaffAny to Melioris for payroll processing.

heading_texts: To connect Melioris HRMS to StaffAny, follow the steps below:
In StaffAny, go to Settings > Integrations > Melioris
Copy the value of StaffAny Organisation ID and StaffAny Access Token
In Melioris HRMS, go to Admin > Company Settings > Integrations tab -> Staffany tab
Paste the StaffAny API Token and StaffAny Organization ID
Importing Employees from Melioris HRMS to StaffAny
In Melioris HRMS, click on ‘Employee’ on right side menu
Click on ‘pencil’ icon to view the employee profile
Click on Account Info tab-> StaffAny Account tab
Select Access Level and Roles of the account in StaffAny
Wait for the successfully posted message on Melioris HRMS
Employee’s account will be created on StafAny as below
Syncing StaffAny Time Attendance to Melioris HRMS
Prepare the API program to update the new Timesheet instance
API program will use the StaffAny Organisation ID and StaffAny Access Token in Melioris HRMS to access StaffAny attendance
After syncing, StaffAny attendance data can be viewed in Melioris Timesheet’s Report -> Timesheet
